seoTitle: West Kalgoorlie vs West Lamington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Kalgoorlie and West Lamington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Kalgoorlie vs West Lamington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Kalgoorlie and West Lamington.
heading: West Kalgoorlie vs West Lamington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Kalgoorlie, Western Australia and West Lamington, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lamington has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to West Kalgoorlie (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Kalgoorlie or West Lamington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Kalgoorlie has a flood risk score of 43/100, while West Lamington scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Kalgoorlie scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. West Lamington scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Kalgoorlie or West Lamington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lamington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
